body: @xkykai has found out that the advective formulation is less diffusive than the diffusive formulation. Also a bug in the computation of the slope has been fixed, so I wanted to test it out and see if the results were still egregious in the one-degree simulation

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

title: Use `AdvectiveFormulation` for the skew fluxes
